channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-07-15 to 2026-07-21
item.description: 0 IDEAL, 3 INTERESTING, 4 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Wed 2026-07-15: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.5 ft @ 5.5 sec, wind 7 kt SW, water 72°F. Low tide: 02:37, 14:38. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.5 ft); period too short (5.5 sec). Thu 2026-07-16: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 6.8 sec, wind 4 kt W, water 74°F. Low tide: 03:25, 15:30. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Fri 2026-07-17: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 4 kt WNW, water 73°F. Low tide: 04:11, 16:20. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Sat 2026-07-18: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 5.2 sec, wind 7 kt N, water 73°F. Low tide: 04:55, 17:10. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.2 sec); wind direction off (N). Sun 2026-07-19: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.5 ft @ 5.0 sec, wind 11 kt WSW, water 73°F. Low tide: 05:40, 18:02. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.5 ft); period too short (5.0 sec). Mon 2026-07-20: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.6 ft @ 7.2 sec, wind 7 kt NNE, water 74°F. Low tide: 06:27, 19:00. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.6 ft); wind direction off (NNE). Tue 2026-07-21: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 07:00, 2.1 ft @ 6.1 sec, wind 8 kt SW, water 70°F. Low tide: 07:16, 20:02. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
item.content:encoded:
0 IDEAL, 3 INTERESTING, 4 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Wed 2026-07-15: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.5 ft @ 5.5 sec, wind 7 kt SW, water 72°F. Low tide: 02:37, 14:38. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.5 ft); period too short (5.5 sec).
  • Thu 2026-07-16: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 6.8 sec, wind 4 kt W, water 74°F. Low tide: 03:25, 15:30. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Fri 2026-07-17: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 4 kt WNW, water 73°F. Low tide: 04:11, 16:20. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Sat 2026-07-18: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 5.2 sec, wind 7 kt N, water 73°F. Low tide: 04:55, 17:10. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.2 sec); wind direction off (N).
  • Sun 2026-07-19: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.5 ft @ 5.0 sec, wind 11 kt WSW, water 73°F. Low tide: 05:40, 18:02. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.5 ft); period too short (5.0 sec).
  • Mon 2026-07-20: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.6 ft @ 7.2 sec, wind 7 kt NNE, water 74°F. Low tide: 06:27, 19:00. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.6 ft); wind direction off (NNE).
  • Tue 2026-07-21: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 07:00, 2.1 ft @ 6.1 sec, wind 8 kt SW, water 70°F. Low tide: 07:16, 20:02. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
